arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 resolver rule.

domain_name.description: The domain name that the Route 53 resolver rule is associated with.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Route 53 resolver rule.

name.description: The name assigned to the Route 53 resolver rule.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the Route 53 resolver rule.

resolver_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the resolver endpoint associated with the Route 53 resolver rule.

resolver_rule_id.description: The ID of the Route 53 resolver rule.

rule_type.description: The type of the Route 53 resolver rule (e.g., FORWARD, SYSTEM, RECURSIVE).

share_status.description: Indicates whether the Route 53 resolver rule is shared with other AWS accounts.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Route 53 resolver rule.
